title: Im a newbee and need some advice
author: F4XXee
selftext:
Hey Guys. 
Im a blue collar man who nearly works 12h daily. I really love my Job but there is more! 
I started to learn how to use Python and in gerneral I started to learn to Work with "Bots". 

We all Know thatbthis topic ist so fucking bog for a new Guy Like me. I dont really Know where to Start. I really want to learn this Things or maybe some other "strategies".
Maybe someone can give me some advice or maybe mentoring me a little Bit. 
I Know the're a Lot of this posts but maybe i really find what i want in this.

Have a nice day. :)

comments.author: ACE_FX21
comments.body:
If you’re just getting into automation, a really practical path is to start inside **TradingView** since it has Pine Script built in. You don’t need to reinvent everything in Python straight away.

1. **Build a simple strategy in Pine Script** – even something basic like moving average crossovers. Backtest it right in TradingView to see if the logic makes sense.
2. **Send TradingView alerts to MT5** – you can connect those alerts to a small Expert Advisor (EA) on MetaTrader 5. The EA listens for webhooks from TradingView and turns them into actual trades.
3. **Run it on a VPS** – that way it’s always online, even when your PC is off.

**What you’ll need:**

* A **TradingView subscription** (to get webhooks/alerts)
* A **Forex VPS** (cheap monthly cost, keeps your MT5 terminal running 24/7)
* A broker account on **MT5**
* (Optional) Python later, if you want to customize or expand the setup

This route keeps things beginner-friendly but still gets you live automation fairly quickly. Once you’ve got that working, then you can decide if you want to dive deeper into Python and build more advanced bots.  
Happy to help if you need further guidance.

comments.author: DryKnowledge28
comments.body: Start with demo accounts and focus on risk management.

comments.author: followmylead2day
comments.body:
I build my own strategies in C# for Ninjatrader. Really fun to do and provides a consistent income. On YouTube @followmylead2021
Go for it

comments.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
comments.body: I have my own auto trading system and I am currently renting it out. There are few users currently trading it and for stats it was profitable in August by 6% of account with max dd of 2% (more or so). If you think to have a trial you can dm me and we can discuss.
